scripts.dev:api: cd ../backend && sh -c 'if [ -x ../venv/bin/python ]; then exec ../venv/bin/python run.py; elif [ -x ../.venv/bin/python ]; then exec ../.venv/bin/python run.py; else exec python3 run.py; fi'
scripts.dev:api:win: cd ../backend && if exist ..\venv\Scripts\python.exe (..\venv\Scripts\python run.py) else (if exist ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe (..\.venv\Scripts\python run.py) else (python run.py))
